Document:
# Adding New Jobs
This guide covers how to create a new job in OpenEdge 14.
## Step 1: Create the Job Prototype
Create a prototype in [mono]Resources/Prototypes/_OE14/Jobs/[/mono]:
- type: job id: OE14Blacksmith name: job-name-oe14-blacksmith description: job-description-oe14-blacksmith playTimeTracker: JobBlacksmith startingGear: BlacksmithGear icon: sprite: /Textures/_OE14/Interface/Jobs/blacksmith.rsi state: icon
## Step 2: Add to Map
Add the job's spawn point to the map using the map editor. Spawn points are entities with the [mono]SpawnPoint[/mono] component and a job filter.
## Step 3: Configure Salary
If the job receives a salary, add the OE14Salary component to the spawn point or job entity:
- type: OE14Salary job: OE14Blacksmith amount: 10 interval: 300 # seconds between payments
## Step 4: Create Starting Gear
Define what the job starts with:
- type: startingGear id: BlacksmithGear equipment: jumpsuit: ClothingUniformBlacksmithApron shoes: ClothingShoesBoot inhand: - BlacksmithHammer
## Step 5: Add Localization
Add strings to [mono]Resources/Locale/en-US/_OE14/jobs.ftl[/mono]:
job-name-oe14-blacksmith = Blacksmith job-description-oe14-blacksmith = Forge weapons and armor for the settlement.
## Content Under Construction
Full guide with screenshots and map editor instructions coming soon.
